organization.fullName: National Institute of Cardiology, Laranjeiras, Brazil

identificationModule.briefTitle: Acute Effects of Powdered Beetroot Extract Supplementation on the Microcirculation of Resistant Hypertensive Individuals
identificationModule.officialTitle: Acute Effects of Powdered Beetroot Extract Supplementation on the Microcirculation of Resistant Hypertensive Individuals

responsibleParty.investigatorAffiliation: National Institute of Cardiology, Laranjeiras, Brazil

leadSponsor.name: National Institute of Cardiology, Laranjeiras, Brazil

descriptionModule.briefSummary: Arterial hypertension is a major public health issue and is considered to be a new epidemic due to its high mortality and morbidity rates. Elevated blood pressure levels increase the risk of coronary artery disease, heart failure, stroke, chronic kidney disease and death. Dietary nitrate supplementation in the form of beetroot powder extract may offer a more accessible way to increase systemic nitric oxide availability and consequently promote vasodilation in these patients. However, studies are needed to assess its benefits in patients with hypertension.
descriptionModule.detailedDescription: Methods and Analyses: This is a double-blind, placebo-controlled clinical trial in which patients with hypertension will be randomly assigned to two groups to receive either nitrate powder supplementation or placebo for a duration of 60 days. The primary outcome will be the reduction in blood pressure levels. Secondary outcomes will include systemic microvascular reactivity and quality of life.

designInfo.interventionModelDescription: Nutritional supplement containing a powdered beetroot extract - 400 mg of nitrate per dose will be used in the supplement group, administered orally at a daily amount of 10 g.

armGroups.label: beetroot powder extract supplement
armGroups.description: A powdered beetroot extract supplement containing 400 mg of nitrate per dose will be used in the supplement group, administered orally at a daily amount of 10 g.
interventionNames: Diagnostic Test: evaluation of systemic microvascular reactivity

armGroups.label: placebo control
armGroups.description: An isocaloric, colored, and flavored supplement composed of maltodextrin will be orally administered.
interventionNames: Diagnostic Test: evaluation of systemic microvascular reactivity

interventions.name: evaluation of systemic microvascular reactivity
interventions.description: Evaluation of systemic microvascular reactivity using laser speckle contrast imaging.

interventions.name: ABPM
interventions.description: Ambulatory blood pressure measuring: systolic, diastolic and mean arterial pressures

interventions.name: beetroot supplement
interventions.description: A powdered beetroot extract supplement containing 400 mg of nitrate per dose will be used in the supplement group, administered orally at a daily amount of 10 g.

primaryOutcomes.description: ABPM - measurement of systolic, diastolic and mean arterial pressure.

eligibilityModule.eligibilityCriteria:
Inclusion Criteria:

* Resistant hypertensive patients, with a diagnosis documented in medical records, without any change in medication or increase in dosage in the past 30 days.

Exclusion Criteria:

* Patients will be excluded from the study if they have: neoplasms, heart failure, are using medications containing nitrate in their formulation, or have undergone renal denervation.
